OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector, e.g. 'flashpoint'.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

GOOGLE_SECOPS_SIEM_INCIDENTS_BASE_URL.description: API base URL (region prefix added at runtime).

GOOGLE_SECOPS_SIEM_INCIDENTS_TLP_LEVEL.description: Default TLP level of the imported entities.

GOOGLE_SECOPS_SIEM_INCIDENTS_FIRST_START.description: How far back to fetch alerts on the very first run (ISO-8601 duration, e.g. P1D). Used only when no prior state exists.

GOOGLE_SECOPS_SIEM_INCIDENTS_SEVERITY_FI.description: Minimum severity level to import. All alerts at or above this level are imported (CRITICAL > HIGH > MEDIUM > LOW > INFO). When not set, all severities are imported. Alerts with unknown severity are always imported.

GOOGLE_SECOPS_SIEM_INCIDENTS_PRIORITY_FI.description: Minimum priority level to import. All alerts at or above this level are imported (CRITICAL > HIGH > MEDIUM > LOW > INFO). When not set, all priorities are imported. Alerts with unknown priority are always imported.

GOOGLE_SECOPS_SIEM_INCIDENTS_RISK_SCORE_.description: Minimum risk score to import. All alerts with a risk score greater than or equal to this value are imported. Alerts without a risk score always pass. When not set, all alerts are imported regardless of risk score.

GOOGLE_SECOPS_SIEM_INCIDENTS_TAGS_INCLUD.description: Comma-separated list of tags to include. Only alerts that have at least one of these tags are imported. When empty, no inclusion filter is applied.

GOOGLE_SECOPS_SIEM_INCIDENTS_TAGS_EXCLUD.description: Comma-separated list of tags to exclude. Alerts that have any of these tags are excluded. When empty, no exclusion filter is applied.
